title: Boulder Co Vlog 4/5/18: Rode to Loveland 75.88mi 4:33:52  3,187ft   161SS

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs after completing a 75.88-mile bike ride from Boulder to Loveland, CO — his first big ride in a while. He recaps the ride logistics, food choices, and physical sensations, then describes spending the afternoon at his mom's house helping with chores and taking his brother's dog to the park.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Keep riding until too weak to go effectively rather than taking prescribed rest days
Real food like a breakfast burrito is better than power bars or oatmeal for long rides
Will stick to cycling until his knee blows out, then switch to running and swimming
Being an athlete heightens everything — food, water, sleep all feel better when your body truly needs them
